global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text promoting travel deals.
global.main_message: Promoting travel with special fares and a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: RouteBloon UGC
elements.description: Bold, uppercase text in a dark color, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Book your next trip
elements.description: Large, friendly font in white, centered in the middle of the ad, conveying an inviting message.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Smaller text in white, positioned below the main body text, emphasizing a promotional offer.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in a warm orange hue, creating a vibrant backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Learn more
elements.description: A prominent button in white with rounded edges, inviting users to take action, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: 30% off
elements.description: A small circular badge in white with a bold percentage, indicating a discount, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear shape or icon, possibly decorative, located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.description: A small rectangular shape in a lighter color, possibly decorative, located in the center of the ad.
